battito.name: Battito
battito.idle_prompt: A soft cute plush Battito character, tiny magical heartbeat creature gently pulsing and bobbing, soft glow, little wings fluttering, big eyes blinking. Subtle calm motion, gentle breathing, soft peaceful blinks, alive and natural. Warm cinematic lighting, soothing atmosphere, friendly and gentle. Loopable, no camera movement, centered character.
battito.speaking_prompt: A soft cute plush Battito character, tiny magical heartbeat creature gently pulsing and bobbing, soft glow, little wings fluttering, big eyes blinking. The character is speaking directly to a child — mouth opening and closing rhythmically with each word, expressive gentle facial expressions, slight head bobbing, warm friendly demeanor. Engaging, lively, cinematic lighting. Loopable talking motion, no camera movement, centered character.
battito.negative_prompt: no glow or magic, frozen still, blurry, distorted, warping
